title: Happu Ki Ultan Paltan
desc: Happu struggles to decide if he should participate in the dance contest with Amma or Rajesh. Later, he is ordered to look for a lost phone.

title: Bhabiji Ghar Par Hai 2.0
desc: Manmohan is a businessman with a traditional wife. Narayan is jobless with a modern wife. Both try impressing each other's spouses, creating hilarious chaos, lies, and comic situations.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Manmohan criticises Angoori's poem, making her cry. He later recites a poem for Anita while she's reading, but she dislikes it.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Manmohan secretly enters Anita's house and thinks she is hugging a stranger. Later, Manmohan discovers Vibhuti's secret identity, Zaleel Kamin Puri who is a famous poet, and reveals it to everyone.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Vibhuti praises Anita and Angoori yet upsets Anita briefly, later everyone shares poems causing confusion as Vibhuti's poetry lie is exposed when Zalil arrives, and Manmohan warns of a loose gorilla.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Manmohan takes back alarm after Vibhuti irritates him. Angoori mistakenly thinks Vibhuti is a gorilla and hits his head.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Anita fumes at Happu for carrying rifle to hunt an innocent animal.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: After Manmohan presents flowers to Anita, the gorilla thrashes him. Later, as the doctor checks Manmohan, he is attacked again. Soon after, Anita realises the animal's crush on her.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Vibhuti accidentally receives female hormones during blood donation. He boasts about it to Angoori as she tries on new bangles.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Vibhuti bargains with the greengrocer and counsels Angoori on husband management. Anita grows upset as Manmohan impersonates Deepu Mastana.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Anita happens to record her intimate moments with Vibhuti in his laptop. Later, Vibhuti offers to take Manmohan's laptop to get it fixed but ends up dropping it in the water.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Manmohan runs a business and is married to a simple girl, while Narayan is unemployed but has an ultra-modern wife. Both attempt to impress each other's spouse, landing themselves in funny situations.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Anita tells Vibhuti that they need to prevent Ladoo from opening his laptop to study something online. Hence, Vibhuti starts playing music loudly in his balcony.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Angoori announces her intention to reside at Amma Ji's for a month in order to worship a cow. However, a determined Vibhuti pledges to source the specific cow in their vicinity.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: When Amma throws a baby shower for Rajjo, everyone enjoys themselves in the party. However, things get tricky when Happu refuses to be the father of Rajjo's child.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Angoori likes men with thick moustache, whereas Anita dislikes them. Vibhuti and Manmohan observe Saxena with artificial facial hair and both resolve to acquire one from him.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Vibhuti tries to impress Angoori by becoming moustachioed. However, when Anita wants to talk to him about something, he does not want to show his fake moustache to her.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Housewives from the community enjoy the attention of each other's husbands.

title: Laal Ishq
desc: An anthology of passionate love stories backed with strong emotions and supernatural elements, set in different backdrops.

desc: An anthology of passionate love stories backed with strong emotions and supernatural elements, set in different backdrops.

title: Paramavatar Shri Krishna
desc: Lord Krishna, once a naughty little child, grows up and embarks on a number of adventures to fight and eradicate evil forces and provide justice to all.

title: Man Mohini
desc: A new couple, Ram and Sia, are experiencing some seriously creepy and unsettling things in their marriage. Is it just bad luck, or something more sinister?

title: Bhabiji Ghar Par Hai 2.0
desc: Manmohan is a businessman with a traditional wife. Narayan is jobless with a modern wife. Both try impressing each other's spouses, creating hilarious chaos, lies, and comic situations.

title: Bhabiji Ghar Par Hai 2.0
desc: Tiwari and Anita stage a fake wedding to acquire a mansion, a ruse that Vibhuti and Angoori join. However, things take a turn when a ghost begins to haunt everyone.

title: Gharwali Pedwali
desc: Jeetu Pandey finds himself caught living a life of duality. He juggles his time with two mothers, two contrasting belief systems, and two spouses while hiding one from another.
